description: We have been able to design complex security structures by analyzing all types of errors, performing predictive analysis and tracking performance metrics. It allows us to fully track the apps we are developing.
author: Kim R.
pros: This is an excellent platform, coherently organizing data for comprehensive multi-source analysis. Developing software is always complex but with this tool you can automate processes and speed up the data-driven development process. It has an attractive and intuitive design.
cons: There is nothing I dislike about this platform.

review_title: Composable Allows Quick, Easy and Powerful Transformations Needed for our Business Use Cases
author: Jeffrey D.
pros: The dataflow feature within composable is easily the best ETL tool that I have used to date. There are countless custom built modules that anything that you are trying to do will be possible. Whether its reading data in from a file on a file system, or extracting data from a system via an API, all processes are easy to setup with the drag and drop canvas of the dataflow. No past coding experience required, which means starting up with composable is extremely easy!
cons: I don't have much to complain about here. The tool is simple to use and runs really fast. As the product matures, I expect more modules to be built out, but there are so many already available!

review_title: Innovative DataOps Platform that's easy to put together.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's a great solution that allows us to have access to all of our evidence even when it's written in another language.
cons: Too much information on a single page necessitated a knowledge transfer that was both time-consuming and difficult to decipher properly.

review_title: Complex custom insurance application management and underwriting easy to improve and maintain
description: I've worked with the Composable team for over three years now. They are a talented group with creative solutions and are quick to help solve complex problems. The Composable platform makes troubleshooting and even some development accessible even for non-technical business users. They've made it possible to deliver more functionality faster and better. It's been a pleasure working with them and using the platform.
author: Rachel C.
pros: The Composable platform makes troubleshooting and development easier and accessible even for non-technical business users. It's been possible to deliver more functionality faster and better.
cons: Would love to be able to get the deployment time down some more.

description: Composable is an excellent platform that allowed our organization to develop digital solutions that incorporate ML and AI. We have been able to build end-to-end ML data pipelines and Enterprise AI solutions in Composable. The support provided by the Composable team is the most professional and responsive among all the vendors I encountered over the past few years.
author: Anderson D.
pros: Composable is used by our team of data scientists to to manage data pipelines and analytical workflows. The Composable platform makes implementing data engineering and analytics automation extremely easy and efficient. The support is also top tier.
cons: None - only had positive experiences with the Composable platform.

description: Composable has helped me deliver my valuable data science work to business end-users by facilitating the timely movement of data, and the creation of clean and functional front-end user interfaces.
author: Noah B.
pros: Using the Composable platform, anyone with a good grasp of programming and development fundamentals can become as useful as a seasoned full-stack developer with minimal training. The only limitations are the competence and creativity of the user. In just a few minutes, I can create intuitive front-end access points to dynamic data queries for non-technical business end-users. I can quickly design bulk upload and download processes to get data where I need it, and automate them to run on timers. The Composable platform has transformed my productivity and ability to provide value to my team.
cons: It can be difficult to figure out how dataflow modules fit together for the first time just using the input and output documentation. Being able to see a working example should be the standard.

author: senthamizhselvan E.
pros: It is an excellent product through with we can have a entire evidence kept accessed successfully by under writter
cons: Too much of information in single page, it required a knowledge transfer and bit complex to understand

review_title: Efficient for data aggregation, processing, and scheduling
author: Spencer A.
pros: Composable fits into our data engineering/BI stack to help us schedule, process, and analyze data. It is simple, easy to use, and replicable for similar applications. Reliability is excellent and troubleshooting is a breeze with traces and status updates.
cons: The UI can be unintuitive at times and require extra clicks.

review_title: Compasable - the Cutting Edge DataOps Platform
description: The ease of use of getting data from multiple sources and do the analytics on it, is just too easy for data science.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Developed for DataOps, Ease of Use, Speed from concept to realization
cons: There is nothing that I dislike about this software

author: Michael W.
pros: being able to schedule your tasks and build out work flow visually and easily. not being as technical, i was able to build out my flow pretty easily
cons: i had access issues that was resolved very quickly b
